chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 215 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 14.05.2024 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the applicant. Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate has filed Power on behalf of private respondent and submits that FIR/Crime No.25 of 2024 has been registered at PS Duber. In view of above, this application is accordingly dismissed as having become infructuous. Judge ARBROHI
